# Bree Pony

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Lore

*Mount.*

---

Attach to a **_Bree_** or **_Hobbit_** character. Restricted.
Attached character gets +1 hit point.
**Response**: When attached character takes damage from an undefended attack, exhaust Bree Pony to reduce that damage by 1.
